title: IPL 2026: KL Rahul, Kuldeep Yadav power Delhi Capitals to dominant win over KKR
content: Delhi Capitals concluded their IPL 2026 campaign with a dominant 40-run victory over Kolkata Knight Riders. KL Rahul's blistering 60 set the tone for Delhi's imposing 203, while Kuldeep Yadav's crucial three-wicket haul dismantled KKR's chase. Despite a strong start from Ajinkya Rahane, KKR faltered, finishing their season with a loss.

title: CEO Mark Zuckerberg's goodbye memo to 8,000 fired Meta staff has 2 promises for survivors
content: Mark Zuckerberg's goodbye memo to 8,000 fired Meta employees on May 20 doubled as a message to the 70,000 staff still standing. The Meta CEO made two promises: no further company-wide layoffs in 2026, and better communication after weeks of internal anxiety. The memo lands as Meta funnels $125-145 billion into AI infrastructure, shifts 7,000 staff to AI projects, and cancels 6,000 open roles.

title: Google co-founder Sergey Brin donates $500,000 to California group, and this is why
content: Google co-founder Sergey Brin is injecting significant funds into San Francisco's local politics, backing a business-friendly tax proposal while opposing a controversial "Overpaid CEO Tax."  This move, following his relocation from Silicon Valley, reflects Brin's broader campaign against wealth redistribution measures, which he links to his personal experience fleeing socialism.

title: Jeff Bezos to Amazon users: We can’t run Amazon the way NYC runs its school system
content: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos has sharply criticized New York City's public school spending, likening its inefficiencies to a poorly run business. He argued that substantial funds aren't reaching teachers, despite high per-student costs. Bezos also dismissed 'tax-the-rich' policies, advocating for identifying and solving root causes of economic struggles instead.

title: NFL Trade Rumors: Chargers, Dolphins eye Steelers’ $4m QB
content: Mason Rudolph is emerging as a potential trade candidate for the Pittsburgh Steelers after reportedly falling to QB3 during offseason workouts behind Aaron Rodgers and rookie Will Howard. Teams like the Los Angeles Chargers, Jacksonville Jaguars, Miami Dolphins, and Denver Broncos have been linked as possible destinations for the veteran backup quarterback.

title: Cowboys, Chiefs emerge as top landing spots for Saints RB Alvin Kamara
content: Will the New Orleans Saints move on from Alvin Kamara? Fresh NFL trade rumors surrounding the veteran running back intensified after GM Mickey Loomis addressed Kamara’s future. With the Dallas Cowboys, Kansas City Chiefs, and Baltimore Ravens emerging as possible landing spots, speculation continues to grow around the Saints star’s $24.5 million contract situation entering the 2026 NFL season.

title: Patriots emerge as favorites to land Eagles star WR A.J. Brown in blockbuster trade
content: A.J. Brown is increasingly rumored to join the New England Patriots, with insiders believing a trade from the Philadelphia Eagles could happen around June 1. Philadelphia reportedly wants a 2027 first-round pick, while New England prefers offering a 2028 selection. The Patriots are viewed as Brown’s strongest landing spot due to their need for a No. 1 receiver and his strong connection with coach Mike Vrabel.

title: Trump turnaround: Open the straits, close the war
content: A new understanding with Iran is emerging to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. This comes after weeks of military escalation. The United States seeks to prevent global economic disruption from energy shipment issues. An agreement is reportedly nearing finalization, though details remain unclear. Iran denies commitments to give up uranium or unconditionally reopen the straits.

title: 'I love Prime Minister Modi': Trump makes surprise live call during US embassy event in Delhi
content: US President Donald Trump made a surprise audio call during the US Embassy's 250th Independence Day celebrations in Delhi, expressing his admiration for PM Modi and calling him "great" and "my friend." Trump emphasized the close US-India relationship, stating India can count on the US "100%" and that the two nations have "never been closer".

title: Horoscope today: Daily astrological predictions for May 25, 2026
content: Horoscope Today: Read daily horoscope predictions for May 25, 2026. Know all about the astrological events and influences that will be affecting each of the 12 zodiac signs. Our astrologer has analyzed the movements of the planets and the alignment of the stars to bring you the most accurate and up-to-date horoscope predictions for the day ahead. Get ready to discover what the stars have in store for you today.

title: ‘Rebellious since childhood’: Mother of Cockroach Janta Party founder
content: Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar police have deployed security at Abhijeet Dipke's residence following death threats received amidst his viral satirical online campaign. Dipke, founder of the Cockroach Janta Party, gained millions of followers online, sparking both admiration and backlash, prompting authorities to ensure public safety.

title: 'We gave him the best opportunity': Pollard's big statement on Hardik Pandya
content: Mumbai Indians concluded their disappointing IPL 2026 campaign with a loss to Rajasthan Royals, finishing ninth. Batting coach Kieron Pollard acknowledged that skipper Hardik Pandya's leadership did not unfold as hoped, but emphasized the season's failure was a collective one. The franchise will now assess the reasons for their downfall before making future decisions.

title: Bullion watch: Gold, silver seen range-bound as US-Iran talks enter crucial phase
content: Gold prices are expected to remain steady this week, influenced by US-Iran talks and upcoming US economic data. Silver, however, may continue to outperform due to geopolitical tensions and high crude oil prices. Investors await signals on the Federal Reserve's next policy move amidst shifting statements from Washington and Tehran.

title: Kangana Ranaut slams trolls targeting Aishwarya Rai Bachchan’s looks and weight
content: Actor-politician Kangana Ranaut has come out strongly in support of Aishwarya Rai Bachchan after the latter faced online criticism over her recent appearances at the Cannes Film Festival. Taking to Instagram Stories on Sunday, Kangana slammed trolls targeting Aishwarya’s looks and weight, while stressing that fashion is a personal form of expression and women do not need to cater to public expectations.

title: Drones of the deep: How unmanned systems will reshape naval warfare
content: Unmanned Underwater Vehicles (UUVs) and Unmanned Surface Vessels (USVs) are revolutionizing naval operations and civilian sectors with their stealth, persistence, and risk reduction capabilities. Navies are investing heavily in these platforms for surveillance, mine warfare, and reconnaissance, while also finding dual-use applications in disaster response and oceanographic research.

title: Riyan Parag explains why RR promoted Jofra Archer ahead of Jadeja
content: Riyan Parag led Rajasthan Royals to the IPL 2026 playoffs with a win over Mumbai Indians, despite admitting areas for improvement. He explained tactical batting decisions and praised Jofra Archer and Ravindra Jadeja, highlighting his instinct-driven leadership. Parag also lauded uncapped bowlers and revealed his own mental toughness despite physical struggles.

title: Indians cut overseas travel spending to $1.9 billion in March: RBI
content: Indian overseas travel spending saw a significant drop in March, with remittances falling by over $212 million from February. This decline, attributed to rising oil prices and a weakening rupee, occurred despite travel remaining the largest component of outward remittances under the Liberalised Remittance Scheme.

title: Why 9 million houses are lying empty in Japan
content: Japan faces a growing crisis with nine million empty homes, or akiya, due to population decline, inheritance issues, and costly demolition. Tax incentives encourage owners to leave properties standing, leading to decay and potential risks for communities. Many of these vacant homes are unsellable or unrentable.

title: CBI probe sought in SC over ‘Cockroach Janta Party’ campaign, fake advocates
content: A Supreme Court plea seeks a CBI probe into the "Cockroach Janta Party" and alleged fake advocates, amidst a political storm over the viral digital campaign. The group, which gained traction discussing unemployment and exam leaks, saw its website taken down. Founder Abhijeet Dipke accused the government of suppression and claimed to have received death threats.

title: AR Rahman says working with Hans Zimmer on Rs 4000 crore Ramayana is a 'great honour'
content: The buzz around Ramayana has only grown stronger ever since the teaser of Nitesh Tiwari’s ambitious mythological drama was unveiled. Starring Ranbir Kapoor in the lead, the two-part cinematic spectacle is already being hailed as one of the costliest and most ambitious projects in Indian cinema, with reports suggesting that the film is being mounted on a staggering budget of nearly Rs 4000 crore. Amid the excitement, music maestro AR Rahman has now opened up about collaborating with celebrated German composer Hans Zimmer for the film’s soundtrack, calling it an “epic collaboration.”

title: CBSE again extends deadline for scanned answer book requests till May 25
content: The CBSE had earlier extended the deadline from May 22 to May 23, then till May 24, and has now further extended it till May 25 midnight amid complaints from students over difficulties in accessing scanned copies of answer books through the portal

title: JMM, Cong. bid to divide society, undermine tribal rights won’t succeed: BJP
content: Jharkhand govt. trying to undermine customs through new PESA Act rules, says Marandi; stresses the need to preserve, protect, and develop all sites of worship belonging to the tribal communities

title: Master plan to transform Kochi into model city to come up in six months, says Satheesan
content: Grand civic receptions accorded to the new Chief Minister in the city and Paravur; actor Mammootty says Satheesan has been entrusted with a huge responsibility; Kochi will be developed on a ‘twin-city’ model, says the CM

title: Minister’s assurance on Plus One seats brings relief to north Kerala students
content: ‘All arrangements for the rollout of the admissions process are in place, and the process will begin once the State Cabinet gives its approval on May 25’

title: Traffic snarls around Edappally, Palarivattom spill over into NH Bypass, other arterial roads
content: ‘Edappally has over time emerged as the epicentre of the snarls, with the congestion spilling over to the Edappally-Aroor NH Bypass and other key arterial roads in the city’

title: Delivery agent’s kindness, head constable’s persistence help find missing dog
content: Bruno, a four-year-old Labrador from Sainikpuri, was reunited with his owner after nearly 24 hours of of anxiety and frantic searching

title: Disambiguating a year of flux: expert panels at The Hindu Huddle, 2026
content: The sixth edition of the ideas conclave of The Hindu Group, The Hindu Huddle, will be held in Bengaluru on June 5 and 6

title: VIT distributed scholarships worth over ₹100 crore for government school students since 2008: VIT Chancellor
content: G. Viswanathan said that the scheme aimed to support high-achieving students from rural government schools who secure excellent marks in higher secondary examinations but lack the financial means to pursue further education

title: Govt. plans to complete paddy procurement over next 10 days: Uttam Kumar Reddy
content: The Minister for Civil Supplies says the procurement target revised to 75 LT based on production estimates

title: Residents block key stretch near Katpadi demanding resumption of water supply
content: On being informed, Melpadi police and revenue officials rushed to the spot and pacified agitated residents who, then, dispersed peacefully

title: I wasn’t allowed to see her body, mother of murdered girl alleges
content: The mother of the 10-year-old girl, who was sexually assaulted and killed near Coimbatore, said her husband took the child’s body to his native place in Salem and cremated it without her consent or allowing her to see the mortal remains

title: SC’s revival of Section 124A for consenting accused brings back a colonial law the country did not want
content: The Supreme Court’s clarification allowing consenting accused to face Section 124A proceedings comes even as the constitutional validity of the sedition law remains under challenge before the top court

title: 12 days after death, family bids tearful farewell to Twisha Sharma; second autopsy done
content: The special investigation team of Bhopal Police, along with the four-member panel of AIIMS New Delhi and forensic experts, visits mother-in-law Giribala Singh’s house to inspect the spot of Twisha Sharma’s death

title: National president Nabin asks BJP State unit not to be complacent while citing T.N. example of Opposition not benefitting from DMK’s failure
content: BJP national president urges Karnataka State unit to instil confidence among people that it is a better political alternative

title: Police protection provided at home of Cockroach Janta Party founder
content: The protection is to ensure there is no crowding around his residence as the CJP is trending online, police official says

title: Tigress which killed four women trapped in Maharashtra
content: The tigress, spotted near Pawanpar pond in Sindewahi taluka in Bramhapuri forest division, was tranquillised, says a forest official

title: Assam Rifles apprehend key accused in 2023 abduction-murder of two Meitei students
content: The main accused, a key member of the United Kuki National Army, an insurgent group active in Manipur’s Churachandpur, has been handed over to the CBI

title: Congress asks its rank and file to be alert against deletion of voters ahead of SIR exercise in Karnataka
content: Many things are happening with respect to SIR. That is why we are working to create awareness about it. The poor and common people need to be told what SIR is: Shivakumar

title: Suvendu urges BJP workers to follow law, says government will do ‘sabka hisab’
content: Trinamool Congress chairperson Mamata Banerjee terms recently held polls “mockery in the name of democracy” and accuses the BJP government of destroying institutions she had ‘built’

title: Grand Vachana Vijayotsava procession marks Basavotsava in Bidar
content: The procession began from Basava Udyana in Shivnagar and passed through Papanash Gate and Papanash Temple before culminating at Akka Annapurnatai’s Aikya Mantapa at Basavagiri

title: Idukki DCC president nominated murder-accused to committee without consultation, say members
content: Demand for ouster of C.P. Mathew from the post grows louder after he nominated the prime accused in the Dheeraj murder case to the committee

title: WB government directs districts to set up holding centres for detained illegal foreigners
content: The development comes days after Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari said that his government would follow a new policy of “detect, delete and deport” while dealing with “illegal infiltrators”. Last year in May, Union Ministry of Home Affairs (MHA) directed all States and Union Territories to identify and verify illegal immigrants from Bangladesh and Myanmar (Rohingyas) within 30 days

title: The Hindu Huddle on Campus to be held at Khaja Bandanawaz University on May 26
content: The event will focus on the theme “The Age of Distraction and Doomscrolling: Its Impact on Student Behaviour and Mental Health”

title: Plea in Supreme Court to probe Cockroach Janta Party ‘activities’, fake law degrees
content: Vernacular, culturally direct, and non-elite modes of institutional speech associated with rural and non-metropolitan traditions are increasingly subjected to disproportionate ridicule within elite digital ecosystems, the petition by a Supreme Court advocate says

title: Marco Rubio in India LIVE: Jaishankar addresses National Day reception at the U.S. Embassy
content: U.S. President Donald Trump calls U.S. Ambassador to India Sergio Gor and says that he "loves India, loves Modi"; U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio said that the two nations will soon seal a trade deal

title: 10 dead in Bhatkal estuary, one still missing
content: ‘They likely entered the estuary to collect shellfish and did not estimate the force of the current that had increased due to the recent rainfall’

title: KTR accuses Congress govt. of conspiring to install meters to farm power connections
content: He says govt. is planning to privatise power distribution by fixing prepaid meters to all categories of consumers

title: Andhra Pradesh breaks 10-year heat record again as mercury crosses 48°C
content: Three stations record above 48°C for the third time in less than a week; APSDMA warns of severe heatwave conditions in more mandals over next three days

title: Govt. committed to reviving Nandi awards, says Cinematography Minister Durgesh
content: He calls upon producers and film personalities to invest in studios, dubbing theatres and recording facilities in the State; Bharat Bhushan takes over as Andhra Pradesh State Film, Television and Theatre Development Corporation

title: Maximum temperatures soar across Telangana, seven districts cross 46C
content: Dummugudem in Bhadradri Kothagudem and Dharmapuri in Jagtial were the hottest locations in the State recording a maximum temperature of 46.3C

title: UCC implementation in Assam: Muslim organisations seek consultations with government
content: Religious and social groups urge the BJP-led government to consult minority stakeholders before introducing the proposed Uniform Civil Code Bill in the Assembly

title: Bengaluru school headmaster arrested under Pocso Act after minor student found pregnant
content: The accused, identified as Chandraiah, has been serving as the headmaster of a government school in Srirampura. According to police, the alleged abuse had been taking place over the past year

title: 2 days after ‘deal’ with Centre, Ladakh representative says nothing final so far
content: a key ladakh representative said "no final agreement or concrete outcome has been reached as yet" he said the govt has responded with certain suggestions . he was part of Friday's talks with a union home ministry sub-committee .

title: Congress in sync with SP in UP, time for talks: Ex-MP PL Punia
content: UP is the next big fight between the governing BJP and the opposition, scheduled for early 2027 . but some remarks and actions on the part of SP and Congress have triggered unease, suggesting a battle of wits ahr .

title: India, Russia hold high-level Army talks to bolster military cooperation
content: Indian Army and Russian forces have held discussions to further deepen their military partnership . the 5th sub-working group (land) meeting was held on X on saturday . both sides held productive deliberations aimed at enhancing mutual learning, operational synergy and bilateral military capabilities .

title: EAM Jaishankar talks energy, raises visa issues with US counterpart Marco Rubio
content: external affairs minister S Jaishankar and his foreign counterpart Marco Rubio sought to revitalise ties in their first bilateral in india . the two sides were cooperating to deal with illegal and irregular mobility, but India's expectation is that legal mobility would not be adversely impacted as a consequence .

title: The final ‘metamorphosis’: Can cockroaches win against humans in real world?
content: cockroaches have been disliked and despised by humans since ages . but today, they are being “liked” and “followed” like never before . they would never have imagined, even in their wildest dreams, that one day would become the centre of a human movement .

title: Congress rules out AIADMK entry into Tamil Nadu government
content: Congress MP says numbers in the state are not too close to destabilise the vijay govt . Tagore: "we are clear. We are against BJP. Backroom politics of BJP should not be allowed" "TVK's floor managers wil't take help of any other party," he says .

title: Pakistan-based Shahzad Bhatti identified as mastermind behind ‘Tehreek-e-Taliban Hindustan’
content: Raj Shekhar Jha is a journalist for the Times of India with over a decade of experience in reporting on national security, terrorism, crime and prisons.

title: Iran world's leading sponsor of terrorism, says Marco Rubio in Delhi
content: u.s. secretary of state Marco Rubio calls it "the world's leading sponsor of terrorism" "they are holding hostage civilian vessels, including ships that have now been stuck in the Persian Gulf," he adds . "there is no nation on earth that sponsors more terrorism than Iran," the embassy says .

title: 1.5 lakh fake AI citations slipped into scientific record in 2025: Study
content: Chethan Kumar is a Senior Assistant Editor with the Times of India. Aside from specialising in Space & Science, he has reported extensively on varied topics, with special focus on defence, policy and data stories. He has covered multiple elections, too. As a young democracy grows out of adolescence, Chethan feels, there are reels of tales emerging which need to be captured. To do this, he alternates between the mundane goings-on of the Common Man and the wonder-filled worlds of scientists and scamsters, politicians and soldiers. In a career spanning nearly 18 years, he has reported from multiple datelines — Houston, Florida, Kochi, Hyderabad, Chennai, Sriharikota (AP), NH-1 (J&K Highway), New Delhi, Ahmedabad, Raichur, Bhatkal, Mysuru, Chamarajanagar, to name a few —  but is based out of Bengaluru, India’s science capital that also hosts the ISRO HQ. Read More

title: Stepdad’s name in certificates stalls passport, student moves HC
content: the petition stated that the stepfather’s name was entered in official records without any formal adoption process or legal procedure AHMEDABAD: for years, a 20-year-old woman’s school records carried the name of the man who raised her after her mother remarried . but the documents no longer reflect her identity or family reality . after losing her mother during the Covid period, she returned to live with her biological father .

title: 'Any Appropriately Located Alternate Plot?': Delhi Gymkhana Club Writes To Centre
content: The Delhi Gymkhana Club wrote in a letter to the Centre that any sudden action against it would impact multiple stakeholders, including employees and patrons.

title: "Agreement With Iran Must Eliminate Nuclear Danger": Netanyahu To Trump
content: Netanyahu was referring to a conversation between the two leaders on Saturday night, which Trump had earlier said "went very well".

title: China Launches 3-Crew Space Flight As Part Of Moon Ambitions
content: The Long March 2-F rocket blasted off in a cloud of flames and smoke on time at 11:08 pm (1508 GMT) from the Jiuquan launch centre in China's northwestern Gobi Desert.

title: Marco Rubio's Pre-Birthday Celebration With Cake In Delhi Ft. Village People
content: Rubio, who turns 55 on May 28, was invited on stage by US Ambassador to India Sergio Gor to take part in the celebrations.

title: Adani Group Helping Maharashtra Achieve Holistic Economic Growth: Industry Leaders
content: Dr. Mahendra P. Kalyankar, Chief Executive Officer (CEO) of the Slum Rehabilitation Authority (SRA) in Mumbai, said that the Dharavi project for skill development of the residents will also be undertaken.

title: Soumya Swaminathan Follows Her Father's Footsteps To London's Royal Society
content: As Dr Soumya Swaminathan takes her place among the Fellows of the Royal Society, her journey reflects not just personal achievement but a larger story of Indian science.

title: After Falta's Re-Election Upset, Another BJP vs Trinamool Bengal Flashpoint
content: The Trinamool Congress's Abhishek Banerjee has sought an explanation from the Election Commission, saying the matter "exposes glaring inconsistencies". Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari has hit back.

title: President Murmu To Confer 66 Padma Awards Tomorrow
content: President Droupadi Murmu will present 66 Padma awards at the first civil investiture ceremony for 2026 to be held in the Ganatantra Mandap of the Rashtrapati Bhavan on Monday.

content: Marco Rubio India Visit Live Updates: The top US diplomat is scheduled to hold talks with External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar and attend a meeting of the Quad foreign ministers.

title: 74-Year-Old Bengaluru Woman Cheated Of Rs 24 Crore In Digital Arrest Scam
content: Investigators said the cyber fraudsters posed as high-ranking officials from the CBI and Enforcement Directorate (ED) and psychologically trapped the victim, Lakshmi Ramamurthy, a senior citizen from Bengaluru, through a fake "digital arrest" operation.

title: 'Do Not Rush': Trump To US Negotiators On Signing Deal With Iran
content: The United States has imposed a blockade of Iranian ports since April 13 after Tehran virtually halted traffic through the economically vital Strait of Hormuz.

content: Twisha Sharma's death and the subsequent claims by her mother-in-law about her mental health spotlight how the stigma surrounding mental illness can be weaponised against those who seek help.

content: Reporting from Varanasi, covering all beats across 10 districts in east UP. title: Government brings in experts from IITs & PSBs to fix glitches in CBSE portal
content: union education minister seeks detailed report from central board of Secondary education . the centre brings in experts from IIT-Madras and IIT kanpur and roping in four public sector banks . CBSE extends last date for applying for scanned answer sheets for rechecking till may 25 midnight .

title: 'India can always count on me, big fan of PM Modi': Gor brings Trump's message
content: 'India can count on me 100%. If they ever need help, they know where to call. they call right here. we're doing well. we have a record economy, a records stock market and anything India wants to get. I am a big fan of Prime Minister Modi," he said .

title: Delhi's Gymkhana Club to move court against government order
content: Delhi Gymkhana Club (DGC) has been at 2, Safdarjung Road for over 113 years . the club's permanent members had a marathon meeting on Sunday evening to decide the legal course of action . a day after l&DO directed the club to hand over its entire premises .

title: What is a claim? IRDAI seeks industry's standard definition
content: Determine the monthly installment amount for a loan Estimate the returns on investments made through SIPs Find out maturity amount and interest earned on PPF Check maturity amount and interest earned on an FD Estimate the pension amount and corpus accumulated under NPS A Mutual Fund Calculator helps estimate the future value of investments

title: ASI shot dead near Amritsar; 3rd cop to be murdered in 3 months
content: He has been working with The Times of India since 2000, reporting on a wide range of subjects including Sikh religious and political affairs, general political and analytical stories, terrorism, issues related to the environment and climate, cross-border affairs, Indo Pak border events ,  NRI issues, spot events, etc. from Amritsar, Tarn Taran, Gurdaspur, Pathankot, and even Chamba and Kangra districts of Himachal Pradesh. Over the years, he has been delivering in-depth stories with regional insight. Read More

title: Insta-cleaning your home? You might be training AI
content: a small subset of customers can opt into a programme where household jobs are recorded . an investor memo linked Pronto's workflows to "physical AI" and robotics training data . the pilot covers 0.1% of users and is meant for customers who feel uneasy about allowing unfamiliar workers into their homes .

title: Bhopal’s best-kept Eid secret: Superstar goats worth lakhs being unveiled in style
content: the city has become the go-to market for india’s richie rich to source big, burly, showpiece bucks for qurbani . goat farms across the city are owners who trade year-round set aside a select few kids . they can grow to 110 cm tall and weigh between 140 and 180 kg .

title: Sub-inspector among 6 cops suspended over explosives on PM Modi convoy route in Bengaluru
content: six police officers, including a sub-inspector, suspended for security lapse during pm's visit to the art of living (AOL) Foundation in the Karnataka capital . explosives were packed in a carton box found near the compound wall of a private property, around 25 feet away from the main road . police sources initially said only two gelatin sticks and a matchbox were found .

title: How a con woman used sharia law to dupe investors of Rs 6,000 crore
